description_long: This object is a combat knife featuring a straight, double-edged blade with a dark, metallic finish. The handle is brass-colored and incorporates a knuckle duster design, providing both grip and protection for the user's hand. The guard is integrated into the handle, separating the blade from the grip and enhancing safety. A black sheath, designed to cover the blade, is included and appears to be made of metal or hard plastic. The overall construction suggests durability and a utilitarian, military-inspired aesthetic. The knife's materials and design indicate it is intended for both cutting and striking functions.
description: A combat knife with a double-edged blade, brass knuckle-duster handle, and a black sheath, designed for durability and protection.
description_view_0: The knife is seen from the tip, showing the narrow profile of the blade and the rounded handle.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the full length of the double-edged blade, the brass knuckle-duster handle, and the black sheath placed above.
description_view_2: Opposite tip view, highlighting the slimness of the blade and the oval cross-section of the handle.
description_view_3: Reverse side view, displaying the blade, handle, and sheath from the opposite direction, with the knuckle holes clearly visible.
attribute_handle_design: brass knuckle-duster style, cylindrical, finger holes, metallic finish
